title: draba lemmonii
intro: Draba lemmonii, also known as Lemmon's draba, is a rare species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Draba lemmonii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
